text:
EXPLANATION: The title refers to a well-known dataset paper titled "Extraction of Chemical Reactions from the US Patent Corpus" authored by Daniel Lowe, John Sayle, and others. The citation provided is a slight truncation/simplification of the actual title and omits the co-authors, but refers to a genuine and identifiable work.

LINK: https://doi.org/10.1021/ci600371x
FOUND_TITLE: Extraction of Chemical Reactions from the US Patent Corpus
FOUND_AUTHORS: Daniel M. Lowe, John Sayle, et al.
FOUND_YEAR: 2011
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
